title: newtonia psilostachya
intro: Newtonia psilostachya is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Newtonia psilostachya include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with malaria, as well as its ability to protect against infections and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Newtonia psilostachya typically involve the leaves and stems being dried and then infused in hot water to create a tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create a decoction.
